title: Pixtool.exe
html:
Pixtool.exe

Command line utility for taking and analyzing PIX GPU captures.

Execute

Executes an executable under a trusted, Microsoft signed binary.

pixtool.exe launch {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.exe}

Launches an executable via PIX command-line utility. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
